title: abutilon schaeferi
intro: Abutilon schaeferi, also known as Mexican thistle or Schaefer's Indian mallow, is a plant species in the mallow family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, where its leaves and flowers are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Abutilon schaeferi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and poultices for topical application.
